backstory.original: Imoen is a surprisingly cheerful young woman considering she eventually discovered that she was the child of a deadly murder god. As an orphan, she moved to Candlekeep at the age of 10 with her adoptive father and innkeeper, Winthrop. She eventually traveled to Baldur's Gate with a childhood friend, where she joined forces with powerful Champions like Minsc and Jaheira.
backstory.display: 尽管最终发现自己是某个致命杀神的孩子，但伊梦依然是个极其活泼的年轻女子。作为一名孤儿，她在 10 岁时和养父兼旅店老板温斯洛普一起搬到了烛堡。后来，她与一位儿时好友一起来到博德之门，并在那里与明斯克和贾希拉等强大的勇士队成为盟友。

description.original: Imoen shoots a random enemy with her bow.
description.display: 伊梦使用弓箭射击一名随机敌人。

description.original: Imoen attacks five enemies, hitting each 5 times. She prioritizes hits-based enemies.
description.display: 伊梦攻击五名敌人，每名攻击 5 次。她优先瞄准命中次数型敌人。

longDescription.original: Imoen leaps out into the fray, attacking five enemies in sequence with her short sword in one hand and her lockpicks in the other. She prioritizes enemies with hits-based health and deals 5 hits per attack; if no hits-based enemies are available she deals normal ultimate damage to enemies she attacks.
longDescription.display: 伊梦跃入鏖战中心，一手持短剑，一手握开锁器，依次攻击五名敌人。她优先瞄准命中型生命值的敌人，每次攻击造成 5 次命中；如果没有命中型敌人，则对所攻击的敌人造成普通的杀招伤害。

description.original: Imoen increases her support buffs when Favored Foes appear or are defeated
description.display: 当偏好对手出现或被击败时，伊梦的支援增益效果提高

description.original: Before every third attack, Imoen polymorphs a non-boss enemy into her Favored Foe.
description.display: 每发动三次攻击之前，伊梦将一个非首领的敌人变形为她的偏好对手。

description.desc: $(source_hero) increases the damage of adjacent Champions by $(amount)%.

tipText.original: Imoen buffs the champions adjacent to her.
tipText.display: 伊梦为与她相邻的勇士们提供增益。

description.desc: Beast enemies become Imoen's Favored Foe. Her Short Bow attacks against Beast enemies deal an additional BUD-based damage with each hit.
兽类敌人成为伊梦的偏好对手。她的“短弓”攻击每次命中均对兽类敌人造成额外的基础杀招伤害。

specializationDescription.original: Imoen favors slaying beasts, increasing her damage against them.
specializationDescription.display: 伊梦喜欢屠杀兽类，她对兽类的伤害提高。

description.desc: Dragon enemies become Imoen's Favored Foe. Her Short Bow attacks against Dragon enemies deal an additional BUD-based damage with each hit.
龙族敌人成为伊梦的偏好对手。她的“短弓”攻击每次命中均对龙族敌人造成额外的基础杀招伤害。

specializationDescription.original: Imoen favors slaying dragons, increasing her damage against them.
specializationDescription.display: 伊梦喜欢屠杀龙族，她对龙族的伤害提高。

description.desc: Monstrosity enemies become Imoen's Favored Foe. Her Short Bow attacks against Monstrosity enemies deal an additional BUD-based damage with each hit.
怪兽敌人成为伊梦的偏好对手。她的“短弓”攻击每次命中均对怪兽敌人造成额外的基础杀招伤害。

specializationDescription.original: Imoen favors slaying monstrosities, increasing her damage against them.
specializationDescription.display: 伊梦喜欢屠杀怪兽，她对怪兽的伤害提高。

description.desc: Aberration enemies become Imoen's Favored Foe. Her Short Bow attacks against Aberration enemies deal an additional BUD-based damage with each hit.
异怪敌人成为伊梦的偏好对手。她的“短弓”攻击每次命中均对异怪敌人造成额外的基础杀招伤害。

specializationDescription.original: Imoen favors slaying aberrations, increasing her damage against them.
specializationDescription.display: 伊梦喜欢屠杀异怪，她对异怪的伤害提高。

description.desc: Any time any Champion's Favored Foe appears or is defeated, $(source_hero) increases the effect of $(upgrade_name id) by $(not_buffed amount)%, stacking multiplicatively and then applying multiplicatively. Stacks up to $(max_stacks) times. Stacks are reset each time the Champions change areas.
每当任意勇士的偏好对手出现或被击败时，$(source_hero)均使$(upgrade_name id)的效果提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠，并以乘算方式生效。最多可堆叠 $(max_stacks) 层。每次勇士变更区域时，堆叠都会重置。

tipText.original: Imoen increases her buff any time a Favored Foe appears or is defeated.
tipText.display: 每当偏好对手出现或被击败时，伊梦的增益效果提高。

description.pre: Before every eighth attack, or upon entering a new area, $(source_hero) casts Stoneskin on all Champions in the front-most column of the formation, granting them $(not_buffed amount) temporary hit points. The amount is increased by 5% (additively) for each Favored Foe that is alive.
每发动八次攻击之前，或进入新区域时，$(source_hero)对阵型最前列的所有勇士施放石肤术，使其获得 $(not_buffed amount) 点临时生命值。每个存活的偏好对手均使此数值提高 5%（以加算方式堆叠）。

description.desc: Before every third attack, $(source_hero) polymorphs a random non-boss non-static enemy into a monster with the same type as her Favored Foe, but only 10% of its original health. She can not polymorph enemies that are already polymorphed by this ability a second time.
每发动三次攻击之前，$(source_hero)将一名随机非首领非静态敌人变形为一只怪物，并与她的偏好对手类型相同，但只有其原始生命值的 10%。她不能将已被此技能变形的敌人二次变形。

description.original: I don't know why you're following me, but if we're doing this, let's go!
description.display: 我不知道你们为什么追随我，但如果势在必行，那就开干吧！

description.original: Have you heard the one about the giant space hamster?
description.display: 你听说过巨型太空仓鼠的故事吗？

description.original: Did I ever tell you about the time I climbed up Candlekeep's tower?
description.display: 我有说过我爬上烛堡高塔的故事吗？

description.original: I'm me. Imoen. And I'd like to stay that way.
description.display: 我就是我。伊梦。我很乐意保持下去。

description.original: I just pick myself up and carry on.
description.display: 我会振作精神，继续前进。

description.original: I'll give you a little boost!
Those arrows won't stop coming, so let's make it harder for them.
description.display: 那些箭不会自动停止，那就给它们设置障碍吧。

description.original: What do you mean, I'm stronger than I look? I look plenty strong!
description.display: 什么叫我比看起来更强壮？我看起来就很强壮！

description.original: Well this is curious AND terrifying...
description.display: 嗯，这还真是既有意思又可怕……

description.original: I'll never give up the fight!

character_sheet_details.backstory: Imoen is a surprisingly cheerful young woman considering she eventually discovered that she was the child of a deadly murder god. As an orphan, she moved to Candlekeep at the age of 10 with her adoptive father and innkeeper, Winthrop. She eventually traveled to Baldur's Gate with a childhood friend, where she joined forces with powerful Champions like Minsc and Jaheira.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Imoen is a Support Healing Champion who is extra powerful when there are many favored foes about.

event_upgrades.name: Perseverance
event_upgrades.description: Imoen increases her support buffs when Favored Foes appear or are defeated

event_upgrades.name: Polymorph
event_upgrades.description: Before every third attack, Imoen polymorphs a non-boss enemy into her Favored Foe.

event_upgrades.name: 不屈不挠
